free_text: Gold neutron capture cross section from 3 to 550 keV.
Energy resolution better than 0.2% below 90 keV.
6Li glass detector used as flux monitor.
Energy calibrated using 4.9-eV resonance in gold.
Corrections have been made for average scattering of
